title: St. Philomena's Cathedral

overview.short: St. Philomena's Cathedral is a much-loved spiritual town in Karnataka, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Philomena's Cathedral, officially the Cathedral of St. Joseph and St. Philomena, also known as St.

topPlaces.name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Mysore
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Mysore (Latin: Mysurien(sis)) is a suffragan Latin diocese, in the ecclesiastical province of Bangalore in southern India. Its cathedral episcopal see is St.

topPlaces.name: Karunapura
topPlaces.description: Karunapura is a suburb of Mysore city in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Mandi Mohalla
topPlaces.description: Mandi Mohalla or Laskhar Mohalla is a suburb of Mysore city in Karnataka state of India.

topPlaces.name: Nexus Centre City Mall
topPlaces.description: Nexus Centre City Mall is a shopping mall located in the South Indian city of Mysore, Karnataka. It is the largest in Mysuru.

topPlaces.name: Mysuru Sub Urban Bus Station
topPlaces.description: Mysuru Sub-Urban Bus Station is a key bus station hub located located on Bangalore-Nilgiri Road in the Lashkar Mohalla area of Mysore. It's run by the Karnataka State Road Transport Corporation (KSRTC) and operates 24 hours a day, serving long-distance bus passengers.

topPlaces.name: Gayathripuram
topPlaces.description: Gayathripuram is a locality of Mysore, city in South Indian state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: St. Bartholomew's Church, Mysore
topPlaces.description: St. Bartholomew's Church is an Anglican church, built by the Madras Government for the East India Company troops stationed in Kingdom of Mysore and is located in Lashkar Mohalla, on the Nilgiri Road, near the noisy Mysore sub-urban bus stand in Mysore City.

topPlaces.name: C V Rangacharlu Memorial Hall
topPlaces.description: The Rangacharlu Memorial Hall, commonly known as Mysore Town Hall and colloquially referred to simply as the Town Hall, is a Neoclassical-styled public building that was constructed in 1884 in memory of the 14th Diwan of Mysore Sir C. V. Rungacharlu. He was a Dewan (chief minister) of Mysore who served from 1881 to 1883.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Nexus Centre City Mall & around

items.note: Nexus Centre City Mall is a shopping mall located in the South Indian city of Mysore, Karnataka. It is the largest in Mysuru.

Mysuru Sub-Urban Bus Station is a key bus station hub located located on Bangalore-Nilgiri Road in the Lashkar Mohalla area of Mysore. It's run by the Karnataka State Road Transport Corporation (KSRTC) and operates 24 hours a day, serving long-distance bus passengers.
Gayathripuram is a locality of Mysore, city in South Indian state of Karnataka, India.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — St. Bartholomew's Church, Mysore & around

items.note: St. Bartholomew's Church is an Anglican church, built by the Madras Government for the East India Company troops stationed in Kingdom of Mysore and is located in Lashkar Mohalla, on the Nilgiri Road, near the noisy Mysore sub-urban bus stand in Mysore City.

The Rangacharlu Memorial Hall, commonly known as Mysore Town Hall and colloquially referred to simply as the Town Hall, is a Neoclassical-styled public building that was constructed in 1884 in memory of the 14th Diwan of Mysore Sir C. V. Rungacharlu. He was a Dewan (chief minister) of Mysore who served from 1881 to 1883.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Philomena's Cathedral?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Philomena's Cathedral is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Philomena's Cathedral?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Philomena's Cathedral?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Philomena's Cathedral at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Philomena's Cathedral?
faq.a: Stays in St. Philomena's Cathedral start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Philomena's Cathedral?
faq.a: The top attractions are Roman Catholic Diocese of Mysore, Karunapura, Mandi Mohalla, Nexus Centre City Mall, Mysuru Sub Urban Bus Station.
